caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" in gold lettering, and a gold watch sits at a desk in a studio. He wears professional headphones and sits behind a microphone mounted on a boom arm. To his right, a black mug with red text reading "THE TALK OUT LOUD" is visible on the desk. The background features a white wall with a repeated logo that says "UNICORN HUSTLE" accompanied by three gold stars. A blue sign above him displays the phrase "Where BOSSES Talk!". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and reacting, shifting from a wide-mouthed expression of laughter or excitement to a slight smile while gesturing with his hands in front of him. Small logos are also visible in the bottom corners of the frames.
